title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Oxford University Press India:
Oxford University Press India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India!
